## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest tests/ -q`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] Frontend builds (`npm run build` inside `frontend/`)
- [ ] No banned phrases added (`world's first`, `publication-ready`, `finished paper`, `fully autonomous`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] I've read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
